raw.message: Les Smash KO débarquent sur Betclic : élimine tes adversaires et découvre le montant de la prime que tu récupères ! 🤩

hook.summary: High-energy introduction of the 'Smash Knockout' poker mode with dynamic text and character art.
hook.visual_action: A hooded character icon zooms in while coins and poker chips fly across a teal background.
hook.text_overlay: LES SKO DÉBARQUENT SUR Betclic SMASH KNOCKOUT

scene_flow: Title screen reveals 'Smash Knockout' as a new poker mode on Betclic.
Motion graphics show a mobile phone displaying a 'KO' event and increasing prize money.
Text highlights the ability to win up to 50 times the opponent's bounty.
Closing screen provides instructions to find the mode in the app's tournament section.
on_screen_text: LE POKER QUI PEUT RAPPORTER GROS !
RDV DANS LA SECTION TOURNOIS DE TON APP !
audience_proxy: French-speaking male sports bettors and poker players aged 18-35 looking for fast-paced competitive games.
